From Proto-Turkic *yeŋgül (“light; easy”).
Cognate with
Old Uyghur [script needed] (jeŋil, “easy”);
Bashkir еңел (yeñel), Tatar җиңел (ciñel), Kazakh жеңіл (jeñıl), Southern Altai јеҥил (ǰeŋil), Crimean Tatar yengil,
